name: French Toast Strata Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Loaf Italian bread; cut into 1/2-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook the sausage until browned. Remove from the skillet and drain. Crumble the sausage.
2. Add apple slices to the skillet and cook, covered, over medium heat for about 3 minutes, or until tender.
3. In a medium bowl, beat the eggs. Add milk, 1/3 cup maple syrup, and nutmeg; mix well.
4. In a buttered 10-inch pie plate, arrange three-fourths of the bread slices in an even layer.
5. Top with crumbled sausage, apple slices, and remaining bread slices.
6. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the top.
7. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
8. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
9. Bake, uncovered, for 55-60 minutes or until set and golden brown.
10. Serve immediately with additional maple syrup. Leftovers can be stored in the refrigerator.
